name: Orange-Pineapple Marmalade
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried apricots overnight.
2. Grind the apricots until smooth.
3. Grate the rinds of 1 orange and 1 lemon.
4. Add the grated rinds to the apricots.
5. Add the juice from the orange and lemon.
6. Add the crushed pineapple and sugar.
7. Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
8. Cook rapidly for 15 minutes, stirring frequently to prevent scorching. Start timing when the mixture is hot and bubbly around the edge of the pan.
9. Pack the hot marmalade into sterilized jars while still warm.
This recipe makes about 5 pints.
